federal_land_actions.description: Convey identified National Forest System lands out of federal ownership subject to closing conditions.
Acquire identified non-federal lands for National Forest System management and ownership consolidation benefits.

proposed_action_elements.description: Prepare a land exchange involving federal land disposal, non-federal land acquisition, realty case setup, and Forest Plan consistency review.

evidence_refs.summary: Intake evidence documenting the proposed federal disposal, non-federal acquisition, and Forest Plan consistency context.
evidence_refs.title: Proposed Action Narrative

proposed_action_summary: The Forest Service proposes a land exchange involving federal land disposal, non-federal land acquisition, realty case setup, and Forest Plan consistency review. Replace this summary with the project-specific proposed action before package generation.

proposed_action_basis: Federal disposal and non-federal acquisition require a lands/realty land exchange case file.
The proposed federal action must be screened against the applicable Forest Plan before EA package assembly.
